message:
perf(tui): add dashboard render coalescing and lazy export snapshot refresh

Two rendering performance improvements:

1. Dashboard render gate (lib.rs):
   - Add DashboardRenderStamp and DASHBOARD_RENDER_COALESCE_WINDOW (72ms)
     to debounce redundant dashboard redraws when terminal geometry is
     unchanged. The gate skips render_now() calls that arrive within the
     72ms coalesce window with the same (width, ui_height), but always
     renders immediately when geometry changes (resize, split toggle).
   - Reorder render_now() to acquire the writer lock and read geometry
     before the coalesce check, so the gate has access to current
     terminal dimensions without redundant lock acquisitions.
   - Add 4 unit tests: first-frame-always-renders, skips-within-window,
     renders-after-window-elapses, renders-on-geometry-change.

2. Lazy export snapshot (tui_app.rs):
   - Replace the per-frame clone of the entire Frame+GraphemePool with
     a lazy strategy: only refresh the export snapshot when the export
     menu is open, the snapshot is missing, or a one-shot
     export_snapshot_refresh_pending flag is set.
   - Set the pending flag when Ctrl+E opens the export menu, ensuring
     the snapshot is current when the user actually wants to export.
   - Add snapshot_with_size() test helper and 2 tests:
     view_skips_snapshot_refresh_when_export_not_requested and
     view_refreshes_snapshot_when_export_is_armed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
